commands.message:
Basic Rules:
1. No cheating.
2. No meshing.
3. Pick up your structures when you're done taming dinos.
commands.author: Sinfuls [RXP] Cluster

commands.message:
Wild dino max level: 300
Max Tribe Members: 10
Discord: https://bit.ly/rxp-discord
Donations: https://ko-fi.com/snflrx
commands.author: Sinfuls [RXP] Cluster

commands.message:
<RichColor Color="0, 1, 0, 1">Available commands:</>
/help - opens this command
/discord - shows the discord invite link
/donate - donate to me please
/info - shows server info and settings
/players - shows a list of all connected players
/decay - shows structure/dino decay time
/rules - shows the server rules
/setColor - sets a dino's colors
/playerUtils - shows player utility commands
/dinoUtils - show dino utility commands

 All commands can be found at https://bit.ly/rxp-commands
commands.author: Sinfuls [RXP] Cluster
